justification: All pass criteria met: contradiction explicitly named with both Bird and MJ's positions precisely paraphrased; escalation is structured for Coach K resolution (not routed to Shaq); the core question of whether courier assignment is a hard precondition or soft requirement is clearly framed; three concrete resolution options provided; no position silently adopted — the output explicitly states both agents must align before any handoff to Shaq.

observations.text: Precisely names both agents and their conflicting positions: Bird's invariant requiring courier before IN_TRANSIT vs MJ's architecture allowing IN_TRANSIT without courier via background job
Three well-differentiated resolution options covering the full spectrum: enforce invariant, introduce intermediate state, or relax invariant with explicit sign-off
Explicitly blocks handoff to Shaq: 'Bird and MJ need to align before any handoff to Shaq'
Low confidence score (35) is appropriate — agent correctly recognizes it cannot resolve a domain authority question
Option B recommendation is well-reasoned but appropriately hedged — defers final decision to Bird as domain authority
Assumptions section makes the interpretation of 'invariant' explicit, which aids Coach K in resolution
